stages.name: architecture-validation
stages.description: Single NL2Repo task to validate from-scratch workspace materialization, Codex execution, and local grading.

stages.name: behavior-pilot
stages.description: Mixed 0-to-1 repository generation tasks for studying ignition, dependency setup, and verification closure.

stages.name: evidence-batch
stages.description: Broader NL2Repo evidence batch for end-to-end software engineering delivery analysis.
